basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Gorakhpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Child Psychologist, Medical Officer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Gorakhpur (AIIMS Gorakhpur)
basic_details.post_name: Child Psychologist, Clinical Psychologist, Medical Officer (AYUSH)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Gorakhpur (AIIMS Gorakhpur) Child Psychologist, Clinical Psychologist, Medical Officer (AYUSH) Notification 2026 has been released on 13 June 2026 on the official website https://aiimsgorakhpur.edu.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Gorakhpur Child Psychologist, Clinical Psychologist, Medical Officer (AYUSH) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: OBC-NCL: 3 years, SC/ST: 5 years, PwBD: 10 years, Central Govt. Employees: 5 years, Ex-servicemen: length of military service + 3 years

qualification.education_qualification: M.A. / M.Sc. in Psychology with M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology, 2 years experience in Child & Adolescence mental health or Clinical Psychology, Degree in relevant stream of AYUSH with 3 years clinical/teaching experience and enrolment on Central/State Register
qualification.details: Child Psychologist: M.A. / M.Sc. in Psychology with M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology. At least 2 years’ experience in Child & Adolescence mental health. Desirable: Ph.D. in Clinical Psychology from recognized University / Institution. Clinical Psychologist: M.A. / M.Sc. in Psychology with M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology. At least 2 years’ experience in Clinical Psychology. Desirable: Ph.D. in Clinical Psychology from recognized University / Institution. Medical Officer (AYUSH): A degree in relevant stream of AYUSH from a recognized University/Statutory/State board/Council/Faculty of Indian Medicine or equivalent. Enrolment on the Central Register of that stream in Central or State Register of Indian Medicine. 3 years clinical and/or teaching experience in a recognized hospital/teaching institution. Desirable: A postgraduate degree in relevant stream of AYUSH from a Recognized University/Statutory/State/Board/Council/Faculty of Indian Medicine.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Gorakhpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://aiimsgorakhpur.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Gorakhpur Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Gorakhpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Gorakhpur Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Gorakhpur Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Child Psychologist: M.A. / M.Sc. in Psychology with M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology. At least 2 years’ experience in Child & Adolescence mental health. Desirable: Ph.D. in Clinical Psychology from recognized University / Institution. Clinical Psychologist: M.A. / M.Sc. in Psychology with M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology. At least 2 years’ experience in Clinical Psychology. Desirable: Ph.D. in Clinical Psychology from recognized University / Institution. Medical Officer (AYUSH): A degree in relevant stream of AYUSH from a recognized University/Statutory/State board/Council/Faculty of Indian Medicine or equivalent. Enrolment on the Central Register of that stream in Central or State Register of Indian Medicine. 3 years clinical and/or teaching experience in a recognized hospital/teaching institution. Desirable: A postgraduate degree in relevant stream of AYUSH from a Recognized University/Statutory/State/Board/Council/Faculty of Indian Medicine.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Gorakhpur Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: OBC-NCL: 3 years, SC/ST: 5 years, PwBD: 10 years, Central Govt. Employees: 5 years, Ex-servicemen: length of military service + 3 years

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Gorakhpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://aiimsgorakhpur.edu.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Gorakhpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for AIIMS Gorakhpur Recruitment 2026 is 12th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Officer (AYUSH) post?
faq.answer: There are 3 vacancies available for the Medical Officer (AYUSH) post in the AIIMS Gorakhpur Recruitment 2026. This is part of the total 5 vacancies announced.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Child Psychologist post?
faq.answer: For the Child Psychologist post, candidates must have an M.A. / M.Sc. in Psychology with an M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology and at least 2 years of experience in Child & Adolescence mental health.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is between 21 years to 35 years. Age relaxation is provided for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General and OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs 1000/-. However, candidates belonging to SC/ST categories also have to pay the same fee, while PwBD candidates are exempted.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for AIIMS Gorakhpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the posts advertised by AIIMS Gorakhpur will be based on an Interview. Candidates who qualify in the initial screening will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates apply online for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is being done through the offline mode. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will be appointed at Level 10 of the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC), which offers a competitive salary package.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the AIIMS Gorakhpur official website. A direct link to the notification is also provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational/experience certificates along with the application form.

faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for AIIMS Gorakhpur Recruitment 2026 is 12th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.
